displayNameZh: 信任就是商业上最基础的货币
summary: Yt Trust Is Currency component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「信任就是商业上最基础的货币」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-trust-is-currency/src/YtTrustIsCurrency.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtTrustIsCurrency` and `ytTrustIsCurrencyDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Trust Is Currency Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-trust-is-currency to my project. Preserve the exported YtTrustIsCurrencyProps API and register the YtTrustIsCurrency composition with the default props.
